faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Doña Obra and our services.
faq.a1: It's simple: you describe your problem to Doña Obra via chat, she gives you an instant price estimate and recommends the best verified professionals in your area. You choose who to work with.
faq.q2: How do you verify the professionals?
faq.a2: Every professional goes through a verification process that includes identity checks, proven experience, references from previous clients, and insurance verification when applicable.
faq.a3: No, the estimates from Doña Obra are completely free. You only pay when you decide to hire a professional and the job is completed.
faq.q4: What areas of Panamá do you cover?
faq.a4: We're currently available in Panama City and metropolitan areas including San Miguelito, Arraiján, and La Chorrera. We're constantly expanding to new areas.
faq.q5: What if I'm not satisfied with the work?
faq.a5: Your satisfaction is our priority. If you have any issues with the service, our support team will help you resolve it. We work with professionals to guarantee quality work.
faq.q6: Can I request a professional for emergencies?
faq.a6: Yes, several of our professionals offer 24/7 emergency service for urgent situations like water leaks, electrical problems, or locksmith needs. Let Doña Obra know it's urgent and she'll connect you quickly.

services.pageSubtitle: From a dripping faucet to a full renovation, Doña Obra connects you with the right professional for every job. Transparent pricing and verified professionals in Panamá.
services.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for?
services.cantFindSubtitle: Tell Doña Obra what you need and she'll help you find the right professional for any job.
services.plumbingDesc: Repair of pipes, faucets, toilets, and water systems. Includes leak detection, drain unclogging, and installation of plumbing fixtures.
services.electricalDesc: Installation and repair of electrical circuits, outlets, switches, and panels. Includes fault diagnosis and system upgrades.
services.paintingDesc: Interior and exterior painting of walls, ceilings, and facades. Includes surface preparation, primer application, and professional finishes.
services.cleaningDesc: Deep residential and commercial cleaning, post-construction cleaning, and regular maintenance. Includes area sanitization and hard-to-reach space cleaning.
services.acDesc: Installation, preventive maintenance, and repair of air conditioning units. Includes filter cleaning, gas recharging, and fault diagnosis.
services.locksmithDesc: Lock replacement, emergency lockout service, key duplication, and security system installation. Available 24 hours a day.
services.gardeningDesc: Garden maintenance, tree trimming, green area design, and irrigation systems. Includes fertilization and garden pest control.
services.masonryDesc: Structural repairs, renovations, wall construction, flooring, and finishes. Includes work with blocks, concrete, and ceramic.
services.movingDesc: Local moves with professional packing, safe transport, and careful unloading. Includes furniture protection and reassembly at destination.
services.appliancesDesc: Repair of washers, refrigerators, dryers, stoves, and other appliances. Includes diagnosis, parts replacement, and preventive maintenance.

howItWorksPage.pageSubtitle: In 3 simple steps, you go from having a problem at home to having the right professional to fix it. No hassle, no surprises.
howItWorksPage.step1Subtitle: Tell Doña Obra what you need
howItWorksPage.step1Description: Open the chat and describe to Doña Obra what's going on at your home. You can write in your own words — no need to know technical terms. If you have photos of the problem, you can upload them so Doña Obra can better understand the situation.
howItWorksPage.step1Feature1: Chat in natural language, like talking to a neighbor
howItWorksPage.step1Feature2: Upload photos to show the problem
howItWorksPage.step1Feature3: Doña Obra asks questions to understand better
howItWorksPage.step2Description: Based on your description, Doña Obra analyzes the problem and gives you a cost estimate with real price ranges from the Panamanian market. No surprises: you'll know what to expect before hiring anyone.
howItWorksPage.step2Feature1: Estimates based on real prices in Panamá
howItWorksPage.step2Feature3: Breakdown of what the service includes
howItWorksPage.step2Feature4: You confirm before moving to the next step
howItWorksPage.step3Description: Doña Obra presents you with verified professionals who can solve your problem. Each professional has a profile with ratings, experience, and pricing. You choose the one that best fits your needs and budget.
howItWorksPage.step3Feature4: Direct contact with your chosen professional
howItWorksPage.ctaSubtitle: Tell Doña Obra about your problem and get an instant estimate. It's free, fast, and no commitment.

about.pageSubtitle: Behind every repair, there's a story. This is ours.
about.historyP1: Doña Obra was born from a frustration we all know: you need to fix something at home and you don't know who to call. You ask neighbors, search on social media, call numbers someone gave you, and you still don't know if the price is fair or if the work will be done right.
about.historyP2: We're a Panamanian platform that connects homeowners with verified home service professionals. From plumbers and electricians to painters and masons, our goal is simple: to ensure all Panamanians have access to honest home services, with fair prices and trusted professionals.
about.historyP3: We use artificial intelligence to understand your problem, estimate costs based on real Panamanian market prices, and connect you with the right professional. All through a simple conversation, as if you were asking a neighbor who always knows who to call.
about.characterP1: Doña Obra is that neighbor we all wish we had. A Panamanian woman with years of experience who knows all the best professionals in the city. She always has a recommendation, always knows the fair price, and always makes sure the job is done right.
about.characterP2: When you tell her about your problem, she listens carefully, asks the right questions, and guides you to the best solution. Whether it's a dripping faucet or a full renovation — Doña Obra knows exactly who to call.
about.trustDescription: Every professional on our platform is verified. We only work with people who meet our standards for quality, punctuality, and professionalism. Your home is in good hands.
about.transparencyDescription: No hidden costs, no surprises. We give you clear estimates before you make any decision. We know that trust is built with honesty and fair pricing.
about.communityDescription: Doña Obra was born in Panamá and grows with Panamá. We support local professionals, create dignified employment, and strengthen the service network that sustains our communities.
about.missionText: To democratize access to quality home services in Panamá, connecting families with verified professionals through accessible technology, transparent pricing, and a warm, human experience.
about.ctaSubtitle: Tell Doña Obra what you need. She'll help you find the perfect professional.

chat.welcomeMessage:
Hey, what's up! 👷‍♀️ I'm Doña Obra, your go-to neighbor for all things home repairs and services. I know all the best contractors in the city 💪

Tell me what you need — send me text, photos, whatever — and I'll tell you how much it'll cost and who can get it done. Let's get to it! 🔧
chat.relanceMessage: Still there? Tell me more so I can help you better 😊
chat.welcomeSubtitle: Your trusted neighbor for home services in Panamá
chat.newConversationPreview: Hey, what's up! I'm Doña Obra...
chat.requestSent: ✅ Request sent to {name}. They'll contact you on WhatsApp soon.
